issues.description: Second PowerBoost action is missing conditional check. Effect text states 'if your opponent has a Character with 7000 power or more' — this condition must be applied to the second PowerBoost action.
Extraneous effect present. The DSL includes a KO action with trigger 'Trigger' and maxPower condition that does not exist in the card text. This entire effect should be removed.
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Card text explicitly states 'during this turn' which indicates the boost lasts only for the current turn phase, not until end of turn.
